title: Repealed by Acts 2004, No. 220, §1.
doc_html:
§954.2.  Repealed by Acts 2004, No. 220, §1.

NOTE:  See Acts 2004, No. 220, §2, relative to validity and effectiveness of certain rules, permits, and licenses.
